/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcarbot_inference.so -o libcarbot_inference.so CMakeFiles/carbot_inference.dir/src/CudaManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbot_inference.dir/src/InferPipelineManager.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-7.1/lib: /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer.so /opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-7.1/lib/libnvdsgst_meta.so /opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-7.1/lib/libnvds_meta.so -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0
